meaning: Royal Canadian Air Force 加拿大皇家空军
examples: Six are members of the Royal Canadian Air Force (RCAF) who lost their lives in or near Pershore during the World War II.
One of those chosen to have a street named after him is Flying Officer Graham Hynam from the RCAF, who died when his Wellington bomber crashed while taking part in a fly-past over Pershore.
Ex-commanders occupy senior posts in the RCAF.
